season_info.title: Season Information
season_info.description: Horse gram is a hardy pulse suited to low-rainfall areas and marginal soils.

location_note.title: Local Variation Note
location_note.message: Pulses need less nitrogen than cereals and respond well to phosphorus and good drainage.

fertilizer_section.title: Recommended Inputs
chemical: Small starter dose of Urea if required
micronutrients: Zinc or boron if deficiency is seen

season_advice.title: Season Guidance
season_advice.rainy_season: Ensure drainage to avoid root rot and yellowing.
season_advice.dry_season: Light irrigation at flowering and pod formation improves yield.
season_advice.winter_season: Cool and dry weather is suitable for many pulse crops under irrigation.

application_section.title: Application Method
application_section.frequency: At sowing; foliar support if needed at flowering

water_management.title: Water Management
tips: Give irrigation only at critical stages

warnings.title: Important Warnings
points: Avoid water stagnation in the field
